prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `21f83797`.
codex_response:
Two `2` markers determine two row indices and two column indices; the output draws full-width/full-height `2` bars through those rows and columns, then fills the enclosed rectangle interior with `1`. There was no entry for `21f83797` in either summary hint file, so no hint was used and no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_21f83797/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_21f83797/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_21f83797/generator.py#L47). The generator stays on-family by using fixed 13x13 grids, exactly two red seed pixels, nontrivial row/column separation, and outputs derived from the same latent row/column bands rather than from generic noise.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`. The shared build produced [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/21f83797/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/21f83797/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/21f83797/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/21f83797/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/21f83797/previews/preview_03.png).
